sentence: Never arrive boomered to a bufforgasbord you cannot finish.

wombos.definition: The state of being both boozy and hammered — thoroughly intoxicated, beyond merely tipsy. A stronger, more emphatic form of being twinebriated.
wombos.example: He was completely boomered by halftime and could barely stand up.

wombos.definition: A buffet so abundant it crosses into smorgasbord territory — used by Sendy to describe a sentence stuffed with chained wombos.
wombos.example: That paragraph wasn't a sentence, it was a wombo bufforgasbord.
